chapter_title.ar: باب الصَّبْرِ وَ الْجَزَعِ وَ الِاسْتِرْجَاعِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 82– The patience, and the panic, and the saying of [2:156] Surely we are for Allah and to Him we are returning

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/184)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/184)
text: لَا يَنْبَغِي الصِّيَاحُ عَلَى الْمَيِّتِ وَ لَا شَقُّ الثِّيَابِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Ali Bin Uqba, from a wife of Al Hassan Al Sayqal,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The shouting upon the deceased is not befitting, nor is tearing of the clothes’.
en.sarwar: 8. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Ali ibn ‘Uqbah from the woman of al-Hassan al-Sayqal who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that it is not advisable to cry loudly for a deceased or teardown one’s clothes.”
